title: Breeze Bounce
description: Bounce to new heights with Wind-Charged blocks! Inflate them for extra spring, or use them to create crazy obstacle courses.
body:
# Breeze Bounce [![Modfest Carnival](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/carnival/compact.svg)](https://modfest.net/carnival) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1159501560997498952?color=a46083&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=a46083&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/mbuDBHHUws) *** Unleash chaos with Wind Charge-Infused blocks! Send your friends (or yourself) flying with bouncy fun! ![Blocks Banner](https://i.imgur.com/Od5GW2P.png) ## Current Features ### **Velcro Armour** Crafted from leather and cactus, this dyeable armour set provides a unique "Velcro" effect when worn as a complete suit. While shifting, you can cling to and climb wool-like blocks with ease. Additionally, you can apply vanilla armour trims to personalize your gear.
### **Bounce Blocks** A set of Wind Charge-infused, wool-like blocks that will bounce entities that touch any side. When struck by a wind charge the block becomes ‘Inflated’ for a short duration, while inflated bounce power is increased. They are available as full blocks, stairs, slabs, and posts. **Double Bounce** If a sneaking player falls from a height of 2.8 blocks or more onto a non-inflated Bounce Block, the block along with any connected within a 1-block radius will become 'Inflated' for a short duration (4 seconds / 80 ticks). Entities on affected blocks bounce upward immediately. ![Bounce Blocks](https://chefmooon.github.io/assets/img/breeze-bounce/all_blocks.gif) **Details** - Colours: White, Light Grey, Grey, Black, Brown, Red, Orange, Yellow, Lime, Green, Cyan, Light Blue, Blue, Magenta, Purple, Pink - Posts can be placed horizontally - Stairs, Slabs, and Posts can be waterlogged ### **Inflation Machine** A functional block that keeps a group of connected Bounce Blocks ‘Inflated’ as long as it is fueled. Inflation can extend 5 blocks to the side and 1 block above/below in a 11x11x3 area. It can also be placed on its side allowing for greater vertical Inflation(3x11x11).
Crafting Recipes

Velcro Helmet

Velcro Chestplate

Velcro Leggings

Velcro Boots

Bounce Block

Bounce Stair Block

Bounce Slab Block

Bounce Post Block

Inflation Machine

## Supported Versions Breeze Bounce supports [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net) and [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net) for Minecraft 1.21+. Please submit bugs [here](https://github.com/ChefMooon/breeze-bounce/issues). Planned features found [here](https://github.com/ChefMooon/breeze-bounce/blob/1.21.x-multi/README.md#planned-features) ### Support Development **I've Partnered with RocketNode Hosting!** Elevate your Minecraft Hosting experience on RocketNode's robust network, with seamless support, instant server deployment and the ability to customize the server to your liking.
